title: The Oscars
subTitle: Conan O'Brien hosts honors for achievements in film at the Dolby Theatre at Ovation Hollywood while EJAE, Audrey Nuna, Rei Ami, Miles Caton and Raphael Saadiq woo the audience with their performances.

title: Elementary
subTitle: Holmes and Watson unravel the identity of an elusive serial killer. But as the case has gone cold, their interests conflict with the NYPD.

title: Sex and the City
subTitle: Carrie presents her first freelance article to the Vogue editors, who react completely differently. Meanwhile, Richard says he does not want to celebrate his birthday.

title: Sex and the City
subTitle: Big tells Carrie he's moving to Napa Valley, but their last night together is interrupted when Miranda goes into labor. Meanwhile, Samantha suspects Richard of cheating.

title: Silicon Valley
subTitle: The Pied Piper team attempts to execute a stealth plan at Hooli-Con.

title: Silicon Valley
subTitle: Richard finds himself in an unfortunate web of lies, while Jared plans his exit. Furthermore, Gavin plots a major comeback.

title: Silicon Valley
subTitle: The pressure to succeed forces Richard to grow the company in an unexpected way. Meanwhile, Dinesh and Gilfoyle question their ability to make sound choices.

title: Silicon Valley
subTitle: Richard manages several conflicts in his efforts to unite his new employees. Later, Dinesh celebrates a new purchase that Gilfoyle attempts to spoil, while Jian-Yang goes to court.

title: Silicon Valley
subTitle: Panicked by suddenly leading a much larger team, Richard finds himself managing a number of small conflicts in his efforts to unite his new employees. Jian-Yang goes to court, and Gavin is met with pushback over his signature and what it says about him.

title: Silicon Valley
subTitle: Attempting to woo a gaming company to PiperNet, Richard inadvertently angers a prized ally. Dinesh deals with a betrayal. In preparation for a big launch, Gavin leaves his underlings with a cryptic message. Jared gets inside information from Big Head.

title: Silicon Valley
subTitle: Richard's confidence wavers when Laurie and Monica force him to work with Eklow, a new artificial-intelligence company. Meanwhile, Gavin questions his future beyond Hooli.

title: Silicon Valley
subTitle: Richard decides to help Laurie when she is in trouble, but his lack of emotional discipline threatens to backfire on Pied Piper. Meanwhile, Gavin tries to make a deal with a stubborn partner.

title: Silicon Valley
subTitle: As Pied Piper prepares to close on their Series B funding, Richard receives some unsettling news. Meanwhile, Gilfoyle suggests a proposition and Monica is blunt with Richard.

title: The Comeback
subTitle: When 'Seeing Red' is beset by budget cuts, Valerie offers to let the production shoot some vital scenes at her home. However, it leads to much drama, expected and otherwise.

title: The Comeback
subTitle: As shooting for 'Seeing Red' reaches its conclusion, Valerie faces the prospect of working with a different director, an interview with a journalist from The New York Times and several other problems.

title: Game of Thrones
subTitle: Jon and Sansa face Ramsay Bolton on the fields of Winterfell. Later, Daenerys strikes back at her enemies, while Theon and Yara arrive in Meereen.

title: Game of Thrones
subTitle: Cersei and Loras Tyrell stand trial by the gods, while Daenerys prepares to set sail for Westeros. Later, Sam and Gilly arrive in the Citadel and Bran discovers a long-kept secret.

title: Sex and the City
subTitle: Miranda determines not to become a mentally consumed full-time mother. Meanwhile, Charlotte blurts out her belief in the theory that everyone receives only two great loves.

title: Sex and the City
subTitle: Samantha gives Richard another chance after his unfaithfulness. Meanwhile, although Miranda is an atheist, she cannot deny Steve's entire Catholic family the opportunity to have the baby baptised.

title: The Comeback
subTitle: Valerie's plans to spend Saturday night with Mark are wrecked when reshoots for 'Seeing Red' are relocated to the middle of the desert.

title: The Comeback
subTitle: "Seeing Red" is finally on the air and Valerie is exposed to a variety of critical thoughts. Far more critical than the ladies of "The Talk", or a pressroom of media bloggers, is husband Mark. On a surprise trip to Mickey's apartment, Valerie gets a surprise herself.

title: Elementary
subTitle: Sherlock returns to an old case in London, dealing with his history. Meanwhile, Watson uncovers aspects of his life before New York and his brother Mycroft reveals some secrets.

subTitle: Richard discovers a problem in the code writing and hires Kevin to write the code for him.
